childHeadings: HYDRIDES - A PROVEN TECHNOLOGY FOR HYDROGEN STORAGE
SOLIDHYDROGEN specialises in a certain class of hydrides functioning at ambient temperatures, for re
SOLIDHYDROGEN hydrides solutions have the following benefits
Low cost – Cheapest storage of H2 per kg per cycle against any gaseous, liquid or solid storage

Pure H2 with no
toxic or explosion
risk

Long term storage
and efficient at all temperatures

Independent from
rare and expensive raw materials
Low volume- 3 times as much energy per litre as H2 at 700 bar
